## Type of change

- [ ] New example or recipe under `examples/`
- [ ] Fix to an existing example
- [ ] Documentation improvement (README, llms-install.md, etc.)
- [ ] New client install snippet in `README.md` and `llms-install.md`

## Verification

- [ ] I ran the example end-to-end against the production endpoint with a real API key.
- [ ] All JSON snippets parse (`python -m json.tool`).
- [ ] If I changed install snippets in `README.md`, I also updated `llms-install.md` to match.
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or personally identifying information in this PR.
